data.body: Team Three Review complete (4 of 6 agents — Gemini hit capacity limits). Key themes: documentation integrity crisis (palette drift, typography contradiction in AGENTS.md, stale brand-guide), hardcoded old palette colors in hero, mobile nav UX gap.
